source_jobs.title: Founding Enterprise Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

At Inkeep, we power the only AI Agent platform designed for engineers and non-engineers.



Our customers include leading AI companies like Anthropic and Midjourney as well as high-growth tech companies like PostHog and Postman. Our customers trust Inkeep to help them provide a world-class experience for their users and be a force multiplier for their employees.


We're backed by Khosla Ventures and Y Combinator, growing quickly, and looking for exceptional account executives who want to work at the edge of AI technology.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for an account executive to focus on mid-market to enterprise accounts. We have a great inbound funnel today, and are looking for someone who can capitalize on that but also be eager to find and land large accounts and build an Enterprise sales team.



In this role, you'll get a great foundation of a top-notch product, great existing customer base, and a solid playbook, but with the ability to shape and define our enterprise sales motion. As a plus, you'll be constantly be exposed to the latest in the world of AI and how companies are implementing AI Agents in practice.



Responsibilities

 - Taking leads and running the entire sales cycle, from demo to close.

 - Being creative and high-touch to help generate and land enterprise customers

 - Understanding our product in-depth so customers can view you as a product expert.

 - Modify and refine our sales collateral to best speak to customer needs.

 - Work directly with the product and engineering team to influence roadmap.
   
   

Qualifications

 - 4+ years in account executive role focused on mid-market to enterprise accounts

 - A background working at modern B2B SaaS companies or selling a technical product

 - Can speak to or relate with highly technical audiences.



Bonus

 - Experience helping lead a growing startup from initial PMF to scaled enterprise sales

source_jobs.title: Member of Technical Staff, TypeScript Engineer (Principal)
source_jobs.description:
About Inkeep
Our open-source Agent Platform is uniquely designed to make it easy for both engineers and non-technical teams to build agents on a single platform.



Our customers include leading AI companies like Anthropic and Midjourney use our platform to build best-in-class AI experiences for their users and automate workflows for their teams.



We're backed by Khosla Ventures and Y Combinator, growing quickly, and looking for exceptional engineers who want to work at the forefront of AI with a high-velocity team and are excited by open-source and TypeScript.



About the role
As a Staff Engineer, you'll own a large surface area of the product, both by being a product and system architect that's helpful to others on the team, as well as being a core individual contributor. You'll have significant ownership over how thousands of developers build AI agents, from API design to SDK ergonomics to the abstractions that make agentic systems easy to build.


This is a high-leverage role where you'll:

 - Own platform features end-to-end: architect, build, and maintain critical systems that our customers depend on.

 - Lead technical and team direction: Serve as a leader and resource

 - Shape the developer experience: design APIs, SDKs, and tools that developers love to use

 - Build at the frontier and in public: work on cutting-edge agentic systems and see your work used in production at leading AI companies -- all while contributing to open source.

 - Influence product direction: your technical and product insights will directly shape our roadmap

 - Work directly with customers: understand how teams build AI agents and design elegant solutions for their needs
   
   

What we're looking for

 - Strong TypeScript expertise: 4+ years building full-stack products with TypeScript, with a deep understanding of end-to-end web fundamentals

 - System design skills: you can architect APIs and systems that are elegant, scalable, and developer-friendly

 - Product thinking: you care about the end-user experience and think through how people will actually use what you build

 - Full-stack fluency: comfortable working across the stack, from APIs to SDKs to UIs

 - High ownership: you want to own problems end-to-end, not just ship code



Bonus points for

 - Experience building with AI (prompts, evals, RAG, agentic workflows, etc.)

 - Background in developer tools or B2B SaaS products

 - Open source contributions or public projects that demonstrate your craft

 - UX or design sensibility



Our craft-driven culture
We expect every engineer to have strong product intuition and to think through the complete user experience. If you love building for other developers and are excited about building end-to-end agentic systems, this role is a great fit.



Why join us

 - High impact: shape the platform that powers AI agents for leading companies

 - Technical depth: work on complex, challenging problems at the frontier of AI

 - Ownership: drive product, architectural, and technical decisions end-to-end

 - Learning: get deep on how AI Agents work and what it takes to ship them in production

source_jobs.title: Content Engineer (Product Videos and Motion Graphics)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT INKEEP

At Inkeep, we power the only AI Agent platform designed for engineers and non-engineers.

Our customers include leading AI companies like Anthropic and Midjourney, plus high-growth tech companies like PostHog and Postman. Our customers trust Inkeep to help them provide world-class support for their users and be a force multiplier for their internal teams.

We're backed by Khosla Ventures and Y Combinator, growing quickly, and looking for exceptional people who want to work at the forefront of AI.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for a content video creator who's a storyteller and engineer at heart. You'll be responsible for helping showcase our product across various modern marketing channels while telling our customers' stories—and ours. Our product is compelling to all types of roles, from VPs of Support to CTOs, so having empathy with how modern SaaS companies operate and being able to speak to the needs of multiple personas via visual assets is key.



The types of content will include product launch videos, onboarding content, and other marketing and educational content. The product is a software and developer tool product, so the majority of content will revolve around how to showcase the product.



Responsibilities

 - Incorporating graphics, video, and animations into social media and marketing collateral

 - Filming product demos for product launches and our sales collateral

 - Creating educational content to help with our support and onboarding processes
   
   

Qualifications

 - 3+ years as a video content creator.

 - 2+ years experience with motion graphics and animations for product launch videos

 - 2+ years working at or on projects related to technical SaaS products

 - Can speak to or relate with highly technical audiences.



Bonus

 - Experience with graphic design.

 - Experience in content writing, growth, developer relations, or related marketing roles.

 - Experience with early-stage, high-growth startups.

source_jobs.title: Member of Technical Staff, Design & Frontend Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Inkeep

At Inkeep, we power the only AI Agent platform designed for engineers and non-engineers.

Our customers include leading AI companies like Anthropic and Midjourney, plus high-growth tech companies like PostHog and Postman. Our customers trust Inkeep to help them provide world-class support for their users and be a force multiplier for their internal teams.

We're backed by Khosla Ventures and Y Combinator, growing quickly, and looking for exceptional people who want to work at the forefront of AI.



About the role

As a Design Engineer, you'll own user experiences end-to-end, from product decisions to front-end engineering. You'll work directly with customers, influence product direction, and build the interfaces that define how millions of users interact with AI. This isn't a typical design or engineering role. You'll:

 - Ship full features independently: engineer, build, and iterate based on real user feedback

 - Work directly with customers: understand their needs deeply and validate solutions with them

 - Shape product direction: your design and technical insights will directly influence how the product is built and what we roadmap items we prioritize

 - Build in public: see your work used by users at some of the world's leading AI companies within days
   
   

What we're looking for

 - Strong design sensibility: you have excellent product intuition and can use tools like Figma or vibe-coding platforms to communicate and validate ideas

 - Solid engineering chops: 3+ years building user-facing products with TypeScript (React/Next.js or similar frameworks)

 - Customer empathy: you care deeply about understanding user needs and building delightful experiences

 - High ownership: you want to own problems end-to-end, not just work on tickets
   
   

Bonus points for

 - Open source contributions or public projects that show your craft

 - Experience building AI products or developer tools

 - Strong opinions on what makes great product experiences
   
   

Why join us

 - High impact: your work will be used by millions of users at companies you admire

 - Learning: work on cutting-edge AI technology with a fast, technical team

 - Ownership: we're small enough that you'll have massive influence on product and company direction

 - Growth: as an MTS, you're on a technical leadership track from day one

source_jobs.title: Forward Deployed Engineer, AI Agents
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

At Inkeep, we power the only AI Agent platform designed for engineers and non-engineers.



Our customers include leading AI companies like Anthropic and Midjourney as well as high-growth tech companies like PostHog and Postman. Our customers trust Inkeep to help them provide a world-class support experience for their users and a force multiplier for their employees.



We're growing quickly and looking for new team members who like working at the forefront of AI with a fast and smart team with high levels of ownership and impact.


Our investors include Khosla Ventures and Y Combinator.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Our customers are often highly technical teams who embed Inkeep Agents into their customer-facing experiences (docs, help center, marketing site, etc.) and internal workflows. To enable this, we provide a full extensible Agent platform which includes extensible UI components, AI and RAG APIs, an Open Source Agent Framework. In this role, you'll be partnering with both their technical and non-technical business teams to help them on that journey.



The role involves being high-touch with customers to help them succeed. If you want to become an expert on how companies embed and deploy reliable AI systems, Inkeep is a great fit.



Responsibilities

 - Onboard and support customers through pilots

 - Create templates, quickstarts, and other technical onboarding artifacts

 - Use AI to make your work more efficient and our customers' lives easier
   
   

Qualifications

 - 2+ years in solutions/sales engineering, support engineering, or other engineering roles with customer-facing responsibilities

 - Strong experience with TypeScript (Python experience is a plus)

 - Strong communication and organizational skills

 - Located in NYC or willing to relocate (this role is in-office 5 days a week)
   
   

Bonus if you have...

 - Experience with technical writing

 - Experience working at a developer tool or B2B SaaS company


Benefits

 - Health, Dental, and Vision insurance

 - Unlimited PTO

notes: High-growth AI company with a strong engineering core, backed by Khosla Ventures and Y Combinator.
